Get Started
Who We Are

Creativity House — Building the Future of Organizations

Creativity House Sdn. Bhd. is a multinational training, consulting, and technology solutions company specializing in administrative development, leadership empowerment, project management, and digital transformation. Founded in 2014 and headquartered in Cyberjaya, Malaysia since 2017, we have grown into a trusted partner for organizations across the Middle East, Africa, and Southeast Asia.

10+
Years of Experience
17+
Countries Reached
3
Regional Operations

Our Vision

To be the global first choice in administrative and leadership development, empowering individuals and organizations to achieve sustainable success and measurable impact.

Our Mission

To deliver innovative, practical, and technology-driven training and consulting services that develop human capabilities, strengthen institutional performance, and accelerate digital adoption in modern organizations.

Empowering businesses with innovative IT solutions, custom software, and expert training since 2015.

Services

  • CRM Systems
  • Project Management
  • Cloud Solutions
  • Training
